properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are many who are called, few are chosen by you Created just to worship, in Spirit and in Truth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We're laying down our lives oh Lord, to follow where you lead Not only called, but we're chosen by you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Redeemed for a purpose, we are your Church Lord, called out of the darkness to reveal the light The time is now for, for the worshippers to arise and serve you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Laboring in the harvest, we are your hands and feet Building up the kingdom till you come

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We're laying down our lives oh Lord, for the days are so few Not only called, but we're chosen by you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Chosen generation, royal priesthood, holy nation We are a peculiar people, to give you praise, we show your light

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We need you to make us a Chosen generation, royal priesthood, holy nation We are a peculiar people, to give you praise, we show your light
